heading: Special delivery postage allowance for President of Senate
label: 6116 Special delivery postage allowance for President of Senate
text: The Secretary of the Senate is authorized and directed to procure and furnish each fiscal year (commencing with the fiscal year ending ) to the President of the Senate, upon request by such person, United States special delivery postage stamps in such amount as may be necessary for the mailing of postal matters arising in connection with his official business.September 30, 1982
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 42a of this title
